title: Vecākais motion dizainers / Senior motion designer

summary.lv: AGCSOFT meklē vecāko motion dizaineri, kas radīs augstas kvalitātes animētu vizuālo saturu produktiem un mārketingam, sadarbojoties ar dizaina un mārketinga komandām.
summary.en: AGCSOFT is hiring a Senior Motion Designer to create high-quality animated visual content for product and marketing, partnering with the design and marketing teams.
